feature_name: dameraulevenshtein(s1, s2, int insdel, int rep, int trans)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str1 VARCHAR(255), str2 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'MonetDB', 'DB3');
SELECT dameraulevenshtein(str1, str2, 4, 2, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET str2 = 'Monet' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dameraulevenshtein(str1, str2, 1, 1, 2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
